title: Visually Rich Infographic
sourceTitle: Yapper So Prompt Create Visually Rich Infographic

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a visually rich infographic about Sadie Sink. Research their era, key achievements, turning points, and lasting impact. Use a dramatic portrait-style central illustration as the focal point, surrounded by annotated timeline segments, quote callouts, and symbolic icons representing their legacy. Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.
